json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: File received from SFTP for processing
json-logger:logger.message: Customer ship to File received from SFTP for processing

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Incoming Payload
INFO: Customer Ship To file processed from SFTP
json-logger:logger.message: Customer Ship To file processed from SFTP

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { object: Mule::p('sfdc.customerShipTo.object'), externalId: Mule::p('sfdc.customerShipTo.externalId') }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { apiName: Mule::p('api.name'), apiVersion: Mule::p('api.version'), traceId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as DateTime, message: "Success", sfResponse: write(payload,"application/json") } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}

json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: Customer Ship To file processed successfully
json-logger:logger.message: Customer Ship To file processed successfully

json-logger:logger.doc:name: ERROR: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder
json-logger:logger.message: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload.allFailedJobs map ((item, index) -> { FFDCUSN: item.originalFields.Customer_Number__c default "", FFDCNMB: item.originalFields.Name default "", FFDCA1B: if (item.originalFields.ShippingStreet? and item.originalFields.ShippingStreet != "") (item.originalFields.ShippingStreet splitBy " ")[0] default "" else "", FFDCA2B: if (item.originalFields.ShippingStreet? and item.originalFields.ShippingStreet != "") // Get everything after first space do { var parts = item.originalFields.ShippingStreet splitBy " " --- if (sizeOf(parts) > 1) joinBy(parts[1 to -1], " ") else "" } else "", FFDCTYB: item.originalFields.ShippingCity default "", FFDSTEB: item.originalFields.ShippingState default "", FFDZPCB: item.originalFields.ShippingPostalCode default "", FFDSCEM: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Customer_Email__c default "", FFDSCAC: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Customer_a_r_Contact__c default "", FFDSAEM: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Customer_a_r_Email__c default "", FFDSCPA: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Customer_Purch_Agent__c default "", FFDSPEM: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Purch_Agent_Email__c default "", FFDPHNB: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Phone__c default "", FFDSLNB: item.originalFields.Sales_Rep__c default "", FFDCSCD: item.originalFields.Chain_store_code__c default "", FFDTRMC: item.originalFields.Terms_Code__c default "", FFDINSI: item.originalFields.Special_Instructions__c default "", FFDCTPE: item.originalFields.Customer_Type_Number__c default "", FFDDTEI: if (item.originalFields.Date_of_Last_Order__c != null) (item.originalFields.Date_of_Last_Order__c as String replace /-/ with "") else "", FFDDTEL: if (item.originalFields.Date_of_Last_Payment__c != null) (item.originalFields.Date_of_Last_Payment__c as String replace /-/ with "") else "", FFDDTBC: if (item.originalFields.Date_of_First_Order__c != null) (item.originalFields.Date_of_First_Order__c as String replace /-/ with "") else "", FFDDSOA: item.originalFields.Average_Daily_Sales__c default null, FFDAMDU: item.originalFields.Customer_Amount_Due__c default null, FFDAGE0: item.originalFields.Age_Period_0_Amount__c default null, FFDAGE1: item.originalFields.Age_Period_1_Amount__c default null, FFDAGE2: item.originalFields.Age_Period_2_Amount__c default null, FFDAGE3: item.originalFields.Age_Period_3_Amount__c default null, FFDAGE4: item.originalFields.Age_Period_4_Amount__c default null, FFDPHNF: item.originalFields.Ship_To_Fax__c default "", FFDORGN: item.originalFields.Order_Guide_Number__c default "", FFDLSPY: item.originalFields.A_R_Last_Pay_Amount__c default null, FFDCGRP: item.originalFields.Customer_Group_Code__c default "", errorMessage: item.errorMessage })

json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: Customer Ship To File processed failed
json-logger:logger.message: Customer Ship To file processed failed

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Customer Ship to Exit
json-logger:logger.message: Customer Ship to Sub Flow Completed
